_comment: Copy this to ./.claude/deploy.json and fill it in. Loamkit is host-agnostic: a staging deploy is just a git push to a branch your host watches (Coolify, a self-hosted VPS, Forge/Ploi, GitHub Actions). The deploy-staging skill / scripts/deploy-staging.sh read these keys (env vars CP_STAGING_* override the file). Keep sensitive values (e.g. a webhook URL with a token) in environment variables, NOT committed here.
_comment_staging_branch: Branch your host watches for staging. The helper pushes HEAD here and refuses protected names (main/master/production/prod/release).
_comment_staging_remote: Git remote to push to (must already be configured in this repo).
_comment_staging_webhook: Optional deploy webhook the helper POSTs after pushing. Empty by default; if it carries a secret/token, set it via the CP_STAGING_WEBHOOK env var instead of committing it.
_comment_staging_url: Optional public staging URL, shown in the deploy summary so you can preview.
